turns.text: What is the birth date of the oldest player?

turns.query: SELECT birth_date FROM players ORDER BY birth_date DESC LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT birth_date FROM players ORDER BY birth_date ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Give the player id and last name instead.

turns.query: SELECT player_id ,  last_name FROM players ORDER BY birth_date LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT player_id, last_name FROM players ORDER BY birth_date ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Give the first name and country code instead.

turns.query: SELECT first_name ,  country_code FROM players ORDER BY birth_date LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT first_name, country_code FROM players ORDER BY birth_date ASC LIMIT 1;
